name: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc.
description_short: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services offers title loans, payday loans, and installment loans up to $15,000 with same-day approval at their Sunnyvale, TX location.
description_long:
Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. operates a storefront at 3535 North Belt Line Road in Sunnyvale, Texas, serving residents of Sunnyvale, Mesquite, Garland, Balch Springs, and Forney. The company is part of a broader Texas-based lending operation focused on short-term, asset-backed consumer loans for borrowers who may lack access to traditional credit.

The Sunnyvale branch offers three distinct loan products. Car title loans allow borrowers to use a lien-free vehicle title as collateral in exchange for cash up to $15,000, while retaining use of the vehicle during repayment. Payday loans provide short-term cash advances tied to the borrower's income and next paycheck, requiring proof of income, a valid ID, and an active checking account. Installment loans offer a middle-ground option with fixed monthly payments and more flexible repayment terms than a standard payday loan, also requiring a checking account and income verification.

The location markets several distinguishing operational features: no credit check is required for title and payday loan products, the approval process is designed to complete within approximately 30 minutes once documents and vehicle inspection are done, and funds can be deposited electronically the same day or next business day. An online request form initiates the process before an in-store visit. Store hours are Monday through Friday 10AM–6PM and Saturday 9AM–1PM, closed Sundays.

While the speed and accessibility of these loans can address genuine emergencies for credit-constrained borrowers, the website does not disclose any interest rates, APR figures, or fee schedules — a significant omission that prevents comparison shopping. Title loans carry the real risk of vehicle repossession if repayment obligations are not met, and payday loans are structurally short-term obligations that can become costly if rolled over. Borrowers should request full cost disclosures before signing and explore lower-cost alternatives such as credit union payday alternative loans (PALs) if available.
pros: Loan amounts up to $15,000 secured by vehicle title
Approval process designed to complete in approximately 30 minutes
No credit check required for title loans and payday loans
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the repayment period
Three loan types available — title, payday, and installment — under one roof
Online request form allows pre-application before an in-store visit
Same-day or next-business-day electronic fund deposit available
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website
Title loans use the vehicle as collateral — failure to repay risks repossession
Payday loans must be repaid by next paycheck, creating potential rollover risk
Single storefront limits access to residents outside the immediate Sunnyvale/Mesquite/Garland area
Closed Sundays; Saturday hours end at 1PM, limiting access on weekends
best_for: Vehicle owners holding a lien-free car, truck, or SUV title who need immediate cash
Employed individuals needing a short-term bridge loan until their next paycheck
Consumers with poor or no credit history who are ineligible for traditional bank loans
Residents of Sunnyvale, Mesquite, Garland, or Balch Springs facing urgent, unexpected expenses
diagnosis: This location is best suited for credit-constrained borrowers who own a paid-off vehicle or have steady income and need cash urgently within hours. The primary caveat is that no cost information is published — APR and fees are undisclosed — making it impossible to assess the true expense of borrowing without a direct inquiry, and title loan products carry vehicle-loss risk if payments are missed.
services: Installment loans with fixed monthly payments
In-store vehicle inspection for title loan valuation
Same-day or next-business-day electronic fund disbursement
In-person assistance from local loan specialists
